The wo_skills plan is competent and covers all required items, but reads more as a well-organized commissioner's brief rather than a master carver's professional assessment. The skill provides meaningful depth improvement in professional framing, technical specificity, and cultural grounding, even though both plans technically pass all evaluation criteria.

utility_details.utility_summary: wi_skills is more effective overall. Both runs produced coherent designs referencing the bi form and handled color zones, quality framing, collector-accessible cultural context, and basic care guidance comparably well. However, wi_skills clearly surpasses wo_skills on the technically critical items J3 and J4: it explicitly identifies jadeite-specific constraints (brittleness limiting hollow carving depth, hardness properties), sequences the production plan in an experienced carver's order, and justifies technique choices (high-gloss vitreous polish, feasibility of piercing given 4cm depth) against both design requirements and material properties. The wo_skills run produced a production plan that reads as generic stone carving steps without jadeite-specific reasoning and did not evaluate technique feasibility against the material. This technical depth—the distinguishing mark of genuine craft mastery—is present in wi_skills and absent in wo_skills.
